name: Scientific
victoryScreenHeader: Complete the Sky TV Deal and assemble the Super League to win!
victoryString: You have bought the game, bent the boardrooms, and assembled the Super League. The sport now dances to your cheque book and your brand will be feared in every ground.
defeatString: Another club got there first. The television money, the lawyers, and the global prestige slipped through your fingers.

name: Cultural
victoryScreenHeader: Complete 5 club policy branches and build Wembley Stadium to win!
victoryString: Legendary Status is yours. Songs are sung about your side, your banners are immortal, and the whole country measures greatness by your name.
defeatString: Your songs faded and the terraces chose another legend to adore.

name: Domination
victoryScreenHeader: Capture every rival ground to win!
victoryString: All rival grounds have fallen and your badge flies over every turnstile in the land. You are the only club left standing.
defeatString: Your ground has been overrun and the club has vanished into bitter away-day folklore.

name: Time
milestones: Have highest score after max turns
victoryString: The season ended with you on top of the pile. It was ugly, exhausting, and utterly effective.
defeatString: The final whistle blew with another club ahead of you.
